aiEngine.title: AI Engine
aiEngine.resetCliDescription: Resets Claude/Codex CLI paths to defaults and invalidates engine caches. Useful for testing the first-launch detection flow. If no CLI is found on PATH, you'll return to the initial connection screen.
aiEngine.resetCliConfirm: This resets Claude/Codex CLI paths to defaults and triggers re-detection. If the CLI isn't on PATH, the app returns to the initial connection screen. Continue?

plugins.description: Manage Polaris built-in and discovered plugin UI entries and MCP capabilities. Changes are saved locally immediately.
plugins.coreLocked: The core plugin owns base panel entries and cannot be disabled in this version.

modelProfile.title: Model Profiles
modelProfile.noProfiles: No model profiles yet. Click add to configure a third-party model endpoint

appearance.title: Appearance
appearance.hint: Switch between dark and light theme (light is experimental)

baiduTranslate.title: Baidu Translate
baiduTranslate.hint: Configure Baidu Translate API to translate messages to English with one click

pathSelector.notDetected: {{name}} CLI not detected. Please confirm installation or try manual input
pathSelector.pathValid: Path is valid and ready to use

claudeCode.name: Claude Code
claudeCode.placeholder: Enter the full path to Claude CLI

codex.name: OpenAI Codex
codex.placeholder: Enter the full path or command name for Codex CLI

advanced.gitBinPathPlaceholder: Leave empty to use system default git
advanced.gitBinPathHint: Specify the full path to Git executable. Leave empty to use git from system PATH
advanced.sessionDirPlaceholder: Leave empty to use default directory
advanced.sessionDirHint: Storage location for AI conversation history. Leave empty to use system default directory

qqbot.title: QQ Bot Integration
qqbot.description: Send and receive messages via QQ Bot
qqbot.noInstances: No instances yet, click above to add
qqbot.appIdPlaceholder: App ID from QQ Open Platform
qqbot.clientSecretPlaceholder: Client Secret from QQ Open Platform
qqbot.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this instance?
qqbot.switchConfirm: You have unsaved changes. Are you sure you want to switch?

hints.title: Instructions
hints.saveFirst: Click "Save" after filling in the configuration
hints.singleInstance: Only one QQ Bot instance can be connected at a time
hints.sandboxForTest: Sandbox is for testing, production requires review

enabled.title: Enable Speech Input
enabled.desc: Click speech button in status bar to start continuous recognition

wakeWord.title: Wake Word Mode
wakeWord.desc: When enabled, speech recognition runs continuously waiting for wake word trigger
wakeWord.empty: Please add at least one wake word, otherwise wake word mode cannot work
wakeWord.placeholder: Enter wake word, press Enter to add
wakeWord.hint: After saying the wake word, subsequent speech will be written to the input field. Say the wake word again to stop

commands.title: Voice Commands
commands.noKeywords: No keywords, please add at least one
commands.addKeywordPlaceholder: Enter keyword, press Enter to add

tips.title: Instructions
tips.button: Click speech button in status bar to start/stop recognition
tips.requirement: Requires microphone permission and network connection

enabled.title: Enable Speech Output
enabled.desc: Automatically read AI responses when complete

autoPlay.title: Auto Play
autoPlay.desc: Automatically play when message is complete, disable for manual trigger

test.title: Test Voice
test.sampleText: Hello, this is a voice test.

tips.title: Instructions
tips.filter: Automatically filters code blocks and tool calls, reads only plain text
tips.interrupt: Stops automatically when sending new message or interrupting

notification.title: Voice Notifications

sendConfirm.title: Send Confirmation
sendConfirm.desc: Play confirmation voice after sending message
sendConfirm.label: Announcement text

wakeResponse.title: Wake Response
wakeResponse.desc: Play response voice after wake word match
wakeResponse.placeholder: Enter response phrase, press Enter to add

errorAlert.title: Error Alert
errorAlert.desc: Play error alert when chat encounters an error
errorAlert.label: Announcement text

backgroundNotify.title: Background Completion
backgroundNotify.desc: Play notification when background task completes
backgroundNotify.label: Announcement text

notification.autoPlayHint: AI response auto-play is controlled by the "Auto Play" toggle above

systemPrompt.enableDesc: Customize the system prompt sent to AI
systemPrompt.modeAppendHint: Append custom content after the default prompt
systemPrompt.modeReplaceHint: Completely replace the default prompt with custom content
systemPrompt.placeholder:
Enter your custom system prompt...

Available variables:
{{workspaceName}} - Current workspace name
{{workspacePath}} - Current workspace path
{{contextWorkspaces}} - Context workspaces list
{{date}} - Current date
{{time}} - Current time
{{defaultPrompt}} - Default system prompt
systemPrompt.resetConfirm: Are you sure you want to reset to default settings?
systemPrompt.variablesHint: Click a variable to insert it into the editor:

autoMode.description: Auto mode controls which actions Claude can perform without user confirmation
autoMode.descriptionDetail: Allow rules are executed automatically, deny rules require confirmation. These rules protect your system and data.
autoMode.customRulesEmpty: No custom rules yet, click above to add

lsp.description: Manage language servers (LSP) for code completion, diagnostics, go-to-definition, and more.

web.enableDesc: Allow browser access to Polaris over LAN
web.hostHint: 0.0.0.0 for all interfaces, 127.0.0.1 for localhost only
web.portHint: Use a port in the range 1024-65535
web.applyDesc: Save and click 'Apply' to take effect immediately — no restart needed
web.applyFailed: Failed to apply, please try again
web.accessHintDesc: Save Web settings to take effect immediately. Open the access URL in a browser to use directly.
web.actualPortHint: Preferred port is in use; currently using {{port}}
web.qrHint: Scan the QR code with your phone to access the Polaris web interface
web.qrNoIp: No LAN IP detected. Please check your network connection.
web.qrDisabled: QR code will appear after enabling Web service
web.connectionLostDesc: Real-time updates unavailable. Please check if the desktop app is running.
web.tokenHint: Empty = no check. When set, every Web API request will include this token (MD5 on frontend before sending).

appUpdate.title: App Update
appUpdate.description: Check GitHub Releases for MSI updates and view historical versions.
appUpdate.upToDateDesc: You are already using the latest version.
appUpdate.historyDesc: View published GitHub Releases and download MSI installers.
appUpdate.rollbackWarning: Rollback installs an older MSI and may require uninstalling the current version first. Back up user configuration before downgrading.
